data.title: Metaplanet revenue jumps 42% in Q2 as Bitcoin holdings reach 13,350 BTC
data.description:
3-7-2025 – Japanese investment firm Metaplanet delivered second-quarter earnings of 1. 097 billion yen ($7. 6 million), representing a 42. 4% increase from the previous quarter, driven primarily by its Bitcoin income generation business
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/metaplanet-revenue-jumps-42-in-q2-as-bitcoin-holdings-reach-13350-btc/

data.title: The MELANIA team unlocked 25 million MELANIA tokens, worth approximately $5.23 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham data shows that the MELANIA team unlocked 25 million MELANIA from the Lockup contract at 10:31 UTC+8 today, worth about 5.23 million US dollars. Currently, there are 125 million tradable MELANIA tokens in the MELANIA team's Treasury address, worth about 26.07 million US dollars.

data.title: A user may have mistakenly bought $1.6 million of Company, losing 98% and many addresses made huge profits
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market shows that a certain address "3xwRKt1TzGadMPVFdkjeXPphauvenz9sh4Ji2wHJVQwK" is suspected of mistakenly buying $1.6 million (more than 10,000 Sol) of Meme coin Company, and then only sold $16,000 (105 Sol), with a loss of 98%.
In addition, the address "8mserK943a7Tkx8kw55p4b7Y58dju7p9HWmNc3g4bej9" purchased $608 and made a profit of $880,000
The address "719isQfp8fGHLMSLL1Kg5EYHBQs4hUQgRqA4iQtZQq4n" only purchased $45 and made a profit of $300,000.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: SlowMist CISO: Security company Koi disclosed that more than 40 fake crypto wallet extensions appeared in the official Firefox browser plug-in store
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist partner and chief information security officer 23pds issued a warning on the X platform. Security company Koi disclosed that more than 40 fake crypto wallet extensions appeared in the official plug-in store of Firefox browser, including MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet and other mainstream wallets. These malicious plug-ins steal mnemonics by implanting event monitoring code and sending the data back to the attacker's server.

data.title: Jingji Financial International Shares Surge Following Investment in Amber International
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong-listed Jingji Financial International (HK1468) saw its stock price rise over 14% at the opening, reaching a market capitalization of 478 million Hong Kong dollars. 

The company announced its investment of 12 million USD to acquire shares in Amber International, marking its entry into the institutional crypto services sector.

data.title: Spotify User Community Votes to Tokenize Data for AI Music Platform
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the community of Spotify users known as Unwrapped DAO has voted to tokenize their Spotify usage data and sell the dataset to the AI music platform SoloAI. This transaction is executed using the decentralized infrastructure of the data sovereignty protocol Vana. Through this process, users receive VRC-20 data tokens by pooling their data.

These VRC-20 data tokens grant contributors programmable control, value-sharing rights, and on-chain voting rights. Additionally, they can be used to authorize access to the dataset.

Currently, Unwrapped, which focuses on music data, holds the second position in Vana Epoch 6.

data.title: Retail Digital Service Provider Sees Stock Surge Amid Stablecoin License Application
data.description: According to Foresight News, Yahoo Finance data indicates that the stock price of retail digital service provider Duodian Digital (02586.HK) experienced a significant increase, initially soaring nearly 90%. This surge is attributed to the company's ongoing preparations to apply for a Hong Kong stablecoin license. The stock price has since narrowed to a 55.38% increase, currently trading at 14 Hong Kong dollars.

data.title: Australian Crypto Billionaire Tim Heath Survives Kidnapping Attempt in Estonia
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Australian crypto billionaire Tim Heath narrowly escaped a kidnapping attempt in Estonia last year by biting off part of an attacker's index finger. Heath, a prominent figure in the crypto industry, was ambushed by two men posing as painters in the stairwell of his apartment building in July. This incident is part of a worrying trend of crypto-related kidnappings in 2025, prompting executives to enhance their security measures.

One of the attackers, Azerbaijani national Allahverdi Allahverdiyev, who has a background in boxing and wrestling, attempted to silence Heath by covering his mouth. However, Heath managed to bite through the assailant's finger and retreat to his apartment. The attackers fled the scene, leaving behind a van and part of the finger, which was later discovered 100 meters from the attack site. Heath, originally from Victoria, Australia, is the founder of the Yolo Group and its venture capital arm, Yolo Investments, which focuses on fintech, crypto, and igaming. His net worth is estimated at 2.46 billion Australian dollars ($1.61 billion), placing him at number 66 on the Australian Financial Review Rich List.

The kidnapping plot was reportedly months in the making, with a group of seven individuals allegedly tracking Heath using a GPS device on his vehicle. The group entered Estonia with forged Georgian passports and purchased painters' uniforms to disguise themselves as workmen. Their plan was to abduct Heath, take him to a rented sauna house, and force him to transfer his crypto assets. A hacker was allegedly involved to assist in the operation. Besides Allahverdiyev, Georgian citizen Ilgar Mamedov has been arrested, while two others, including the alleged mastermind Najaf Najafli, are wanted by police. Three additional suspects remain unidentified.

In court, Allahverdiyev claimed he was promised 100,000 euros ($118,000) for the kidnapping but insisted he only pretended to participate and later advised the group to abandon the plan. Prosecutors allege Mamedov was the getaway driver, but he denies any involvement, stating he was in Estonia by accident. The threat to Heath may still persist, as prosecutors revealed that weeks after the failed kidnapping, Heath received a Telegram message with photos of his apartment and a demand for 30 Bitcoin, valued at approximately $3.3 million at the time. Although no further contact was made after Heath ignored the message, prosecutors argue the threat remains. Heath has since invested over $3.1 million in private security and relocated. His legal team seeks reimbursement for these expenses from the accused kidnappers.

data.title: Vlad Tenev Says OpenAI, SpaceX Tokens Not 'Technically' Equity After ChatGPT Parent Questions Giveaway, Robinhood CEO Calls It 'Seed' For Something Bigger
data.description:

data.title: PayPal co-founder and other tech tycoons are planning to build a new bank to serve crypto and AI startups and include stablecoins in their balance sheet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News PayPal co-founder Peter Thiel and several technology billionaires jointly launched a new bank called Erebor, aiming to fill the gap left by the collapse of crypto-related Silicon Valley banks. Erebor plans to serve venture-backed startups in the fields of artificial intelligence, encryption, manufacturing and defense, and has applied to the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency for a national banking license. The two co-CEOs are from software company Argus and crypto payment company Circle. The bank may include stablecoin assets, but details have not yet been announced. (Decrypt)

data.title: This Altcoin Looks Like PEPE Before It Exploded, Analyst Says
data.description:
A cryptocurrency analyst has pointed out how Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) is starting to look similar to Pepe (PEPE) did before its explosion. Pudgy Penguins May Be Following A Similar Path As PEPE In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has talked about how PENGU is showing to the memecoin PEPE in its price chart. Below are the graphs shared by Martinez comparing the trends of the two side-by-side. In both charts, the analyst has marked the Fibonacci Retracement levels for the assets, lines that are based on ratios from the famous Fibonacci series
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/altcoin-looks-pepe-before-exploded-analyst-says/

data.title: 8 years ago, the whale who hoarded ETH transferred more than 4,100 coins to Gemini, worth about $10.51 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember Monitoring, a whale who hoarded 21,600 ETH at an average price of about $569 8 years ago recently transferred 4,123 ETH (about $10.51 million) to Gemini when ETH was close to $2,600. This address has been transferred to Gemini since 2024, totaling 6,361 ETH (about $16.03 million), which has fully covered the cost. Currently, it still holds 13,500 ETH (about $34.94 million) in pure profit.

data.title: Opinion: If Robinhood succeeds, it will eliminate 90% of financial intermediaries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Even Herd CEO Sam Jurrens posted on the X platform that if Robinhood's launch of stock tokens is successful, it will actually eliminate 90% of financial intermediaries, especially Robinhood's proposal to "tokenize everything for free" will accelerate this process. However, Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas questioned Robinhood's propaganda, believing that although Robinhood's stock price has risen 338% in the past 12 months, if investors can already get everything for free through ETFs (investing in large regulated investment tools), there is actually no need to switch to Robinhood (24-hour trading or instant settlement is not an advantage, because 99.9% of investors don't care about these at all).

data.title: Hong Kong stocks Duodian Digital Intelligence once rose by 90%, has allocated BTC and plans to apply for a Hong Kong stablecoin license
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The share price of Hong Kong-listed company Duodian Shuzhi (02586) once soared by nearly 90%. As of press time, it rose by 45.38% to HK$13.
According to the financial industry, Duodian Shuzhi is preparing to apply for a stablecoin license in Hong Kong. Tang Yifan, the company's vice president and chief financial officer, said that the entry of virtual assets into the Web3 field brings huge opportunities, and the penetration rate of cryptocurrencies in global business continues to increase, and has become an important part of diversified investment. Duodian Shuzhi is optimistic about cryptocurrencies in the long term, has allocated Bitcoin, and actively promotes stablecoin and cryptocurrency strategies, while recruiting talents from leading companies in the industry such as Amber Exchange and Crypto.com.
In addition, in February this year, Duodian Shuzhi signed a strategic cooperation agreement with HashKey Group, and the two parties will cooperate deeply in the fields of digital asset trading, Web3 technology development and blockchain ecosystem construction. (Sina Finance)

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Urges Web3 Builders to Prioritize Freedom Over Profit
data.description:
Drawing parallels to the early internet era, Buterin warned the crypto industry not to repeat the mistakes of Web2.
source: https://coindoo.com/vitalik-buterin-urges-web3-builders-to-prioritize-freedom-over-profit/

data.title: Bitcoin Tests Consolidation Range Amid Growing Catalysts
data.description: According to Odaily, a report by 10x Research indicates that Bitcoin is currently testing the upper boundary of its consolidation range as macroeconomic catalysts accumulate. The report highlights strong inflows into ETFs and a continuous decrease in exchange balances, which are adding pressure on the Federal Reserve. Despite these developments, price volatility remains limited. The market may be building momentum for a potential breakout, coinciding with the traditional bull market season in July.
